| map_relief = 1
| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]
| deity = {{ill|Mikumari|lt=Mikumari|fr|Mikumari|ja|水分神|simple|Mikumari-no-Kami|sv|Mikumari-no-Kami|zh|水分神|qid=Q11129547|1=Mikumari}}
}}

{{nihongo|'''Ame-no-Mikumari-toyoura Shrine'''|天水分豊浦命神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Settsu Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}}
* {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}}
* {{ill|Shikinai Subshrine|lt=Shikinai Subshrine|qid=Q135100459|1=Shikinai Subshrine}}
* {{ill|Massha|lt=Massha|ja|末社|qid=Q135009906|1=Massha}}
* {{ill|Kanpei-sha|lt=Kanpei-sha|simple|Kanpei-sha (Engishiki Jinmyocho)|qid=Q135160338|1=Kanpei-sha}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database</ref>
* {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}}
* {{ill|Shikinai Supershrine|lt=Shikinai Supershrine|qid=Q135419779|1=Shikinai Supershrine}}
* {{ill|Q845945|ltq=Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}}
* {{ill|Komori Shrine|lt=Komori Shrine|ja|子守神社|qid=Q11447878|1=Komori Shrine}}

== part of (P361) ==

* {{ill|Q11498550|ltq=Q11498550|qid=Q11498550|1=List of Shikinaisha in Settsu Province}}
** P155: {{ill|Akaruhimenomikoto Shrine|lt=Akaruhimenomikoto Shrine|ja|赤留比売命神社|qid=Q117848511|1=Akaruhimenomikoto Shrine}}
** P156: {{ill|Nunotahimeno- Shrine|lt=Nunotahimeno- Shrine|qid=Q135098896|1=Nunotahimeno- Shrine}}
* {{ill|Q11545333|ltq=Q11545333|qid=Q11545333|1=Todoroki-hime-no-Mikoto Shrine}}

== located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) ==
